overall.description: Aerial footage from a flying vehicle navigating through a dense cyberpunk city at night. The camera moves smoothly between towering skyscrapers illuminated by neon signs and holographic billboards, transitioning from open highway views to narrow building corridors. The scene features the distinctive aesthetic of Cyberpunk 2077 with its characteristic neon-lit architecture and atmospheric haze.

events.description: vehicle begins descending slightly toward the building cluster ahead
moving from open sky into the entrance of the building canyon

agents.ego_description: piloting a flying vehicle over the multi-lane highway, approaching the dense downtown district with neon-lit skyscrapers

entered.detail: large holographic billboard displaying a boxer with 'OUTLOOK' text, brightly illuminated
sparse vehicle traffic moving along the multi-lane road below
cluster of tall glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows forming the downtown skyline
tall street lamps illuminating the highway below with white light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial view from a flying vehicle overlooking a highway at night. A prominent 'OUTLOOK' holographic billboard is visible on the left while the vehicle approaches a dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers. The scene transitions from open sky to the entrance of a building canyon as the vehicle descends slightly.

events.description: ambient light drops significantly as vehicle enters the shadow of surrounding skyscrapers
large glass building on the right temporarily blocks view of the distant skyline

agents.ego_description: navigating between towering skyscrapers, maintaining steady course through the building canyon with close proximity to structures

entered.detail: tall modern glass building with grid-patterned illuminated windows rising on the right side
red neon sign with 'PACIFICA' text visible in the distance on the left building facade
dark concrete building structure with minimal lighting on the left side

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow canyon between skyscrapers, with ambient light dropping as the open sky disappears. A glass office tower rises on the right while the 'PACIFICA' neon sign becomes visible in the distance on the left. The highway fades from view as the vehicle penetrates deeper into the building cluster.

events.description: steam or fog emanates from building ventilation system on the right side
passing the large 'MIX IT UP' holographic billboard on the right

agents.ego_description: threading through a narrow corridor between skyscrapers with building surfaces very close on both sides, passing holographic advertisements

entered.detail: large holographic billboard showing a character with purple hair holding a drink with 'MIX IT UP' text
red neon sign with tiger logo and Asian characters visible in the distance
ventilation system releasing white steam or fog into the corridor

segments.scene_description: Flying through an extremely narrow corridor with no visible sky, the vehicle passes very close to building surfaces. The 'PACIFICA' sign is now prominent on the left. Steam vents release fog on the right as the vehicle passes the 'MIX IT UP' holographic billboard and approaches a red tiger neon sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban canyon with dense signage

events.description: tiger neon sign illuminates the right side with intense red glow, changing local lighting
vehicle banks slightly left to navigate a tight turn in the corridor

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through the darkest and most enclosed section of the corridor, surrounded by glowing neon advertisements and building walls

entered.detail: dark concrete building surface with minimal windows, very close to the vehicle
cluster of smaller neon signs and advertisements on the left building wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through the most enclosed part of the urban canyon, with the tiger neon sign now brightly illuminating the right side in red. The vehicle banks left to navigate the tight corridor as the 'PACIFICA' sign moves further back. The environment is dominated by dark building surfaces and intense neon lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial descent from an open night highway into the claustrophobic depths of a neon-lit urban canyon. It begins overlooking a wide highway with a prominent OUTLOOK holographic billboard, moving forward as the vehicle descends from the open sky toward a dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers. As the camera enters the narrow gap between buildings, the ambient light drops and the highway fades from view, shifting the focus toward a glass office tower on the right and a distant PACIFICA neon sign on the left. The scene then tightens into an extremely narrow corridor where the sky vanishes completely, passing through steam vents and a MIX IT UP hologram before approaching a glowing red tiger sign. Finally, the vehicle banks left through the most enclosed part of the canyon, where the environment is dominated by dark building surfaces and the intense red glow of the tiger neon.
